tagline: Use what you own, before you buy more.

designSystem.style: Organic Biophilic meets Soft UI — natural emerald-green palette evoking freshness and sustainability, with warm amber for urgency cues and indigo for smart AI features. Clean card layouts with generous whitespace, subtle color-coded category system, and a floating elevated Add button as the primary action. Micro-interactions on all tap targets.

screens: Onboarding (3-slide carousel with animated gradient cards and dot pagination)
Home (dashboard with bento stats, expiring-soon horizontal scroll, smart nudges, recipe CTA)
Inventory (searchable list/grid with category pill filters and expiry badges)
Add (3 input method cards + manual form + recently added feed)
Recipes (match-% recipe cards with expandable steps and bookmark save)
Settings (profile card, impact stats bento, dark mode toggle, notification toggles, menu)
